- profile_id=mc17-d2-primary-v1 render_evidence_mode=trained_render evidence_coverage=missing_stage quality_verdict=blocked spatial_query=blocked reason=spatial query evidence missing holdout_witness=blocked reason=holdout witness evidence missing render_quality=blocked reason=render quality evidence missing
